tldr_zh: 本文批判了当前的人工智能评估方法，认为它们不足以评估复杂的、基于智能体的系统，并提出将评估转变为持续的测量规范，以实现信任和治理。
summary_zh: 评估已不再是机器学习生命周期中的最后检查点。随着人工智能系统从静态模型演变为复合的、使用工具的智能体，评估成为一个核心的控制功能。问题不再是“模型有多好？”，而是“我们能否信任系统在变化中、大规模地按预期运行？”。然而，大多数评估实践仍然依赖于从以模型为中心的时代继承来的假设：静态基准、聚合分数和一次性的成功标准。本文认为，这些方法日益模糊而非阐明系统行为。我们研究了评估流水线本身如何引入隐藏的故障模式，为什么高基准分数通常会误导团队，以及智能体系统如何从根本上改变了性能测量的意义。我们不提出新的指标或更难的基准，而是旨在阐明评估在人工智能时代，尤其是对智能体的作用：不是作为性能表演，而是作为一种测量规范，它决定了非确定性系统中的信任、迭代和治理。

title: Flow Actor-Critic for Offline Reinforcement Learning
summary: The dataset distributions in offline reinforcement learning (RL) often exhibit complex and multi-modal distributions, necessitating expressive policies to capture such distributions beyond widely-used Gaussian policies. To handle such complex and multi-modal datasets, in this paper, we propose Flow Actor-Critic, a new actor-critic method for offline RL, based on recent flow policies. The proposed method not only uses the flow model for actor as in previous flow policies but also exploits the expressive flow model for conservative critic acquisition to prevent Q-value explosion in out-of-data regions. To this end, we propose a new form of critic regularizer based on the flow behavior proxy model obtained as a byproduct of flow-based actor design. Leveraging the flow model in this joint way, we achieve new state-of-the-art performance for test datasets of offline RL including the D4RL and recent OGBench benchmarks.
tldr: This paper introduces Flow Actor-Critic, a novel offline RL method using flow policies for both the actor and a conservative critic, achieving state-of-the-art performance on D4RL and OGBench benchmarks.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种新的离线强化学习方法 Flow Actor-Critic，该方法利用Flow模型同时作用于Actor和Conservative Critic，并在D4RL和OGBench基准测试中取得了当前最优性能。
summary_zh: 离线强化学习（RL）中的数据集分布通常呈现出复杂的多模态分布，这需要表达能力强的策略来捕捉此类分布，而不仅仅是广泛使用的高斯策略。为了处理这种复杂的多模态数据集，在本文中，我们提出了一种新的基于流模型的离线RL Actor-Critic方法，称为Flow Actor-Critic。该方法不仅像之前的流策略一样使用流模型作为Actor，还利用表达能力强的流模型进行保守型Critic的获取，以防止在数据外区域出现Q值爆炸。为此，我们提出了一种新的基于流行为代理模型的Critic正则化器，该代理模型是基于流的Actor设计的一个副产品。通过以这种联合方式利用流模型，我们在离线RL的测试数据集上实现了新的最先进的性能，包括D4RL和最近的OGBench基准。

title: From Lossy to Verified: A Provenance-Aware Tiered Memory for Agents
summary:
Long-horizon agents often compress interaction histories into write-time summaries. This creates a fundamental write-before-query barrier: compression decisions are made before the system knows what a future query will hinge on. As a result, summaries can cause unverifiable omissions -- decisive constraints (e.g., allergies) may be dropped, leaving the agent unable to justify an answer with traceable evidence. Retaining raw logs restores an authoritative source of truth, but grounding on raw logs by default is expensive: many queries are answerable from summaries, yet raw grounding still requires processing far longer contexts, inflating token consumption and latency.
  We propose TierMem, a provenance-linked framework that casts retrieval as an inference-time evidence allocation problem. TierMem uses a two-tier memory hierarchy to answer with the cheapest sufficient evidence: it queries a fast summary index by default, and a runtime sufficiency router Escalates to an immutable raw-log store only when summary evidence is insufficient. TierMem then writes back verified findings as new summary units linked to their raw sources. On LoCoMo, TierMem achieves 0.851 accuracy (vs.0.873 raw-only) while reducing input tokens by 54.1\% and latency by 60.7%.
tldr: The paper introduces TierMem, a two-tier memory system for long-horizon agents that uses a summary index for fast retrieval and escalates to raw logs for verification, balancing accuracy, token consumption, and latency. It improves over solely using either summaries or raw logs.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种名为TierMem的两层记忆系统，用于长程智能体。该系统使用摘要索引进行快速检索，并在需要验证时升级到原始日志，从而平衡了准确性、token消耗和延迟。它比仅使用摘要或原始日志都有所改进。
summary_zh:
长程智能体通常将交互历史压缩成写入时摘要。这便形成了一个根本性的写入-先于-查询的壁垒：压缩决策是在系统知道未来查询的关键所在之前做出的。因此，摘要可能导致无法验证的遗漏——决定性的约束（例如，过敏）可能会被删除，导致智能体无法用可追溯的证据来证明答案的合理性。保留原始日志恢复了权威的真实信息来源，但默认情况下基于原始日志进行推理成本高昂：许多查询可以从摘要中回答，但原始日志推理仍然需要处理更长的上下文，从而增加了token消耗和延迟。

我们提出了TierMem，一个溯源链接的框架，将检索视为一个推理时的证据分配问题。TierMem使用一个两层存储层次结构，以最经济的充分证据回答问题：默认情况下，它查询快速摘要索引，只有当摘要证据不足时，运行时充分性路由才升级（Escalates）到不可变的原始日志存储。然后，TierMem会将已验证的发现结果作为与原始源链接的新摘要单元写回。 在LoCoMo上，TierMem实现了0.851的准确率（相比之下，仅使用原始日志的准确率为0.873），同时将输入token减少了54.1%，延迟减少了60.7%。

title: Alignment in Time: Peak-Aware Orchestration for Long-Horizon Agentic Systems
summary: Traditional AI alignment primarily focuses on individual model outputs; however, autonomous agents in long-horizon workflows require sustained reliability across entire interaction trajectories. We introduce APEMO (Affect-aware Peak-End Modulation for Orchestration), a runtime scheduling layer that optimizes computational allocation under fixed budgets by operationalizing temporal-affective signals. Instead of modifying model weights, APEMO detects trajectory instability through behavioral proxies and targets repairs at critical segments, such as peak moments and endings. Evaluation across multi-agent simulations and LLM-based planner--executor flows demonstrates that APEMO consistently enhances trajectory-level quality and reuse probability over structural orchestrators. Our results reframe alignment as a temporal control problem, offering a resilient engineering pathway for the development of long-horizon agentic systems.
tldr: This paper introduces APEMO, a runtime scheduling layer that optimizes computational resource allocation in long-horizon agentic systems by detecting trajectory instability and targeting repairs at critical segments, such as peak moments and endings, achieving improved trajectory-level quality and reuse probability.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍APEMO，一种运行时调度层，通过检测轨迹不稳定性并针对关键片段（如峰值时刻和结尾）进行修复，优化长程自主系统中计算资源的分配，从而提高轨迹级质量和重用概率。
summary_zh: 传统人工智能对齐主要关注单个模型的输出；然而，长时程工作流程中的自主智能体需要在整个交互轨迹中保持持续的可靠性。我们引入了APEMO（用于流程编排的情感感知峰终调制），这是一个运行时调度层，通过将时间情感信号付诸实践来优化固定预算下的计算资源分配。APEMO不修改模型权重，而是通过行为代理检测轨迹不稳定性，并在关键片段（例如峰值时刻和结尾）进行修复。跨多智能体仿真和基于LLM的规划器-执行器流程的评估表明，与结构化编排器相比，APEMO始终如一地提高了轨迹级别的质量和复用概率。我们的结果将对齐重新定义为一个时间控制问题，为长时程智能体系统的开发提供了一条弹性工程路径。

title: El Agente Gráfico: Structured Execution Graphs for Scientific Agents
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used to automate scientific workflows, yet their integration with heterogeneous computational tools remains ad hoc and fragile. Current agentic approaches often rely on unstructured text to manage context and coordinate execution, generating often overwhelming volumes of information that may obscure decision provenance and hinder auditability. In this work, we present El Agente Gráfico, a single-agent framework that embeds LLM-driven decision-making within a type-safe execution environment and dynamic knowledge graphs for external persistence. Central to our approach is a structured abstraction of scientific concepts and an object-graph mapper that represents computational state as typed Python objects, stored either in memory or persisted in an external knowledge graph. This design enables context management through typed symbolic identifiers rather than raw text, thereby ensuring consistency, supporting provenance tracking, and enabling efficient tool orchestration. We evaluate the system by developing an automated benchmarking framework across a suite of university-level quantum chemistry tasks previously evaluated on a multi-agent system, demonstrating that a single agent, when coupled to a reliable execution engine, can robustly perform complex, multi-step, and parallel computations. We further extend this paradigm to two other large classes of applications: conformer ensemble generation and metal-organic framework design, where knowledge graphs serve as both memory and reasoning substrates. Together, these results illustrate how abstraction and type safety can provide a scalable foundation for agentic scientific automation beyond prompt-centric designs.
tldr: The paper introduces 'El Agente Gráfico,' a single-agent framework that uses LLMs with structured execution graphs and knowledge graphs to automate scientific workflows, showing improvements in quantum chemistry, conformer ensemble generation, and metal-organic framework design.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了“El Agente Gráfico”，一个使用LLM和结构化执行图及知识图谱来自动化科学工作流程的单智能体框架，展示了在量子化学、构象异构体集成生成和金属有机框架设计方面的改进。
summary_zh: 大型语言模型（LLM）越来越多地被用于自动化科学工作流程，但它们与异构计算工具的集成仍然是临时性的且脆弱的。当前的代理方法通常依赖于非结构化文本来管理上下文和协调执行，从而产生大量的信息，这些信息可能会掩盖决策溯源并阻碍可审计性。在这项工作中，我们提出了El Agente Gráfico，一个单代理框架，它将LLM驱动的决策嵌入到类型安全的执行环境和用于外部持久化的动态知识图谱中。我们方法的核心是对科学概念的结构化抽象以及一个对象图谱映射器，它将计算状态表示为类型化的Python对象，存储在内存中或持久化在外部知识图谱中。这种设计使得可以通过类型化的符号标识符而非原始文本来进行上下文管理，从而确保一致性，支持溯源跟踪，并实现高效的工具编排。我们通过开发一个自动化基准测试框架来评估该系统，该框架涵盖了一套在之前评估多代理系统时使用过的大学水平的量子化学任务，证明了一个单代理，当与可靠的执行引擎耦合时，可以稳健地执行复杂、多步骤和并行的计算。我们进一步将这种范式扩展到另外两大类应用：构象异构体集合生成和金属有机框架设计，其中知识图谱既充当内存基底，又充当推理基底。总而言之，这些结果说明了抽象和类型安全如何为超越以提示为中心的设计的代理式科学自动化提供可扩展的基础。

title: A Self-Supervised Approach on Motion Calibration for Enhancing Physical Plausibility in Text-to-Motion
summary: Generating semantically aligned human motion from textual descriptions has made rapid progress, but ensuring both semantic and physical realism in motion remains a challenge. In this paper, we introduce the Distortion-aware Motion Calibrator (DMC), a post-hoc module that refines physically implausible motions (e.g., foot floating) while preserving semantic consistency with the original textual description. Rather than relying on complex physical modeling, we propose a self-supervised and data-driven approach, whereby DMC learns to obtain physically plausible motions when an intentionally distorted motion and the original textual descriptions are given as inputs. We evaluate DMC as a post-hoc module to improve motions obtained from various text-to-motion generation models and demonstrate its effectiveness in improving physical plausibility while enhancing semantic consistency. The experimental results show that DMC reduces FID score by 42.74% on T2M and 13.20% on T2M-GPT, while also achieving the highest R-Precision. When applied to high-quality models like MoMask, DMC improves the physical plausibility of motions by reducing penetration by 33.0% as well as adjusting floating artifacts closer to the ground-truth reference. These results highlight that DMC can serve as a promising post-hoc motion refinement framework for any kind of text-to-motion models by incorporating textual semantics and physical plausibility.
tldr: The paper introduces a self-supervised post-hoc module, Distortion-aware Motion Calibrator (DMC), to refine physically implausible motions generated from text, improving both physical plausibility and semantic consistency.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一种自监督的后处理模块，即失真感知运动校准器（DMC），用于修正从文本生成的物理上不可信的运动，从而提高物理可信度和语义一致性。
summary_zh: 从文本描述生成语义对齐的人体运动取得了快速进展，但确保运动在语义和物理上的真实性仍然是一个挑战。在本文中，我们介绍了一种失真感知运动校准器（DMC），这是一种后处理模块，用于修正物理上不可信的运动（例如，脚部漂浮），同时保持与原始文本描述的语义一致性。与依赖复杂的物理建模不同，我们提出了一种自监督和数据驱动的方法，其中 DMC 学习在给定有意失真的运动和原始文本描述作为输入的情况下，获得物理上合理的运动。我们将 DMC 评估为一个后处理模块，以改进从各种文本到运动生成模型获得的运动，并证明其在提高物理合理性以及增强语义一致性方面的有效性。实验结果表明，DMC 在 T2M 上将 FID 分数降低了 42.74%，在 T2M-GPT 上降低了 13.20%，同时还实现了最高的 R-Precision。当应用于像 MoMask 这样的高质量模型时，DMC 通过减少 33.0% 的穿透来提高运动的物理合理性，并调整漂浮伪影使其更接近ground-truth参考。这些结果表明，DMC 可以作为一种很有前途的后处理运动优化框架，通过结合文本语义和物理合理性，应用于任何类型的文本到运动模型。

title: Temporal Consistency-Aware Text-to-Motion Generation
summary: Text-to-Motion (T2M) generation aims to synthesize realistic human motion sequences from natural language descriptions. While two-stage frameworks leveraging discrete motion representations have advanced T2M research, they often neglect cross-sequence temporal consistency, i.e., the shared temporal structures present across different instances of the same action. This leads to semantic misalignments and physically implausible motions. To address this limitation, we propose TCA-T2M, a framework for temporal consistency-aware T2M generation. Our approach introduces a temporal consistency-aware spatial VQ-VAE (TCaS-VQ-VAE) for cross-sequence temporal alignment, coupled with a masked motion transformer for text-conditioned motion generation. Additionally, a kinematic constraint block mitigates discretization artifacts to ensure physical plausibility. Experiments on HumanML3D and KIT-ML benchmarks demonstrate that TCA-T2M achieves state-of-the-art performance, highlighting the importance of temporal consistency in robust and coherent T2M generation.
tldr: This paper introduces TCA-T2M, a novel framework for text-to-motion generation that focuses on cross-sequence temporal consistency using a temporal consistency-aware spatial VQ-VAE and a masked motion transformer, achieving state-of-the-art results on HumanML3D and KIT-ML.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种名为TCA-T2M的新型文本到动作生成框架，该框架专注于利用时序一致性感知空间VQ-VAE和屏蔽运动Transformer来实现跨序列的时序一致性，并在HumanML3D和KIT-ML上取得了最先进的成果。
summary_zh: 文本到动作 (T2M) 生成旨在从自然语言描述中合成逼真的人体运动序列。虽然利用离散运动表示的两阶段框架推动了 T2M 研究的进展，但它们通常忽略了跨序列的时间一致性，即同一动作的不同实例之间存在的共享时间结构。这会导致语义错位和物理上不合理的运动。为了解决此限制，我们提出了 TCA-T2M，一个面向时间一致性的 T2M 生成框架。我们的方法引入了一个面向时间一致性的空间 VQ-VAE (TCaS-VQ-VAE) 用于跨序列时间对齐，并结合一个掩码运动Transformer 用于文本条件下的运动生成。此外，一个运动学约束模块减轻了离散化伪影，以确保物理合理性。在HumanML3D和KIT-ML基准上的实验表明，TCA-T2M达到了最先进的性能，突出了时间一致性在鲁棒和连贯的T2M生成中的重要性。

title: A Single Image and Multimodality Is All You Need for Novel View Synthesis
summary: Diffusion-based approaches have recently demonstrated strong performance for single-image novel view synthesis by conditioning generative models on geometry inferred from monocular depth estimation. However, in practice, the quality and consistency of the synthesized views are fundamentally limited by the reliability of the underlying depth estimates, which are often fragile under low texture, adverse weather, and occlusion-heavy real-world conditions. In this work, we show that incorporating sparse multimodal range measurements provides a simple yet effective way to overcome these limitations. We introduce a multimodal depth reconstruction framework that leverages extremely sparse range sensing data, such as automotive radar or LiDAR, to produce dense depth maps that serve as robust geometric conditioning for diffusion-based novel view synthesis. Our approach models depth in an angular domain using a localized Gaussian Process formulation, enabling computationally efficient inference while explicitly quantifying uncertainty in regions with limited observations. The reconstructed depth and uncertainty are used as a drop-in replacement for monocular depth estimators in existing diffusion-based rendering pipelines, without modifying the generative model itself. Experiments on real-world multimodal driving scenes demonstrate that replacing vision-only depth with our sparse range-based reconstruction substantially improves both geometric consistency and visual quality in single-image novel-view video generation. These results highlight the importance of reliable geometric priors for diffusion-based view synthesis and demonstrate the practical benefits of multimodal sensing even at extreme levels of sparsity.
tldr: This paper introduces a method to improve diffusion-based novel view synthesis by incorporating sparse multimodal range measurements (e.g., LiDAR) to create more reliable depth maps, leading to better geometric consistency and visual quality, especially in challenging scenarios.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种通过融合稀疏多模态距离测量数据（如激光雷达）来改进基于扩散模型的新视角合成的方法，从而创建更可靠的深度图，尤其是在具有挑战性的场景中，从而提高了几何一致性和视觉质量。
summary_zh: 基于扩散的方法最近在单图像新视角合成方面表现出强大的性能，其通过将生成模型以单目深度估计推断出的几何结构为条件。然而，在实践中，合成视角的质量和一致性从根本上受到底层深度估计的可靠性限制，而这些深度估计在低纹理、恶劣天气以及遮挡严重的真实世界条件下通常很脆弱。在这项工作中，我们表明，结合稀疏的多模态测距数据提供了一种简单而有效的方法来克服这些局限性。我们引入了一种多模态深度重建框架，该框架利用极稀疏的测距数据，如车载雷达或激光雷达，来生成密集的深度图，这些深度图可以作为基于扩散的新视角合成的鲁棒几何条件。我们的方法使用局部高斯过程公式在角度域中对深度进行建模，从而实现计算高效的推理，同时显式量化观测有限区域的不确定性。重建的深度和不确定性被用作现有基于扩散的渲染管道中单目深度估计器的直接替代品，而无需修改生成模型本身。在真实世界多模态驾驶场景中的实验表明，用我们基于稀疏测距的重建替换仅使用视觉的深度，可以显著提高单图像新视角视频生成中的几何一致性和视觉质量。这些结果突出了可靠的几何先验对于基于扩散的视角合成的重要性，并展示了即使在极稀疏水平下，多模态传感的实际益处。

title: IntRec: Intent-based Retrieval with Contrastive Refinement
summary: Retrieving user-specified objects from complex scenes remains a challenging task, especially when queries are ambiguous or involve multiple similar objects. Existing open-vocabulary detectors operate in a one-shot manner, lacking the ability to refine predictions based on user feedback. To address this, we propose IntRec, an interactive object retrieval framework that refines predictions based on user feedback. At its core is an Intent State (IS) that maintains dual memory sets for positive anchors (confirmed cues) and negative constraints (rejected hypotheses). A contrastive alignment function ranks candidate objects by maximizing similarity to positive cues while penalizing rejected ones, enabling fine-grained disambiguation in cluttered scenes. Our interactive framework provides substantial improvements in retrieval accuracy without additional supervision. On LVIS, IntRec achieves 35.4 AP, outperforming OVMR, CoDet, and CAKE by +2.3, +3.7, and +0.5, respectively. On the challenging LVIS-Ambiguous benchmark, it improves performance by +7.9 AP over its one-shot baseline after a single corrective feedback, with less than 30 ms of added latency per interaction.
tldr: IntRec presents an interactive object retrieval framework that refines object detection in complex scenes based on user feedback, using a contrastive alignment function to disambiguate objects; it achieves significant improvements on LVIS and LVIS-Ambiguous datasets.
tldr_zh: IntRec 提出了一个交互式物体检索框架，该框架基于用户反馈细化复杂场景中的物体检测，使用对比对齐函数来消除物体的歧义； 在 LVIS 和 LVIS-Ambiguous 数据集上取得了显著的改进。
summary_zh:
以下是原文摘要的中文翻译：

从复杂场景中检索用户指定的目标仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务，尤其是在查询模糊或涉及多个相似目标时。现有的开放词汇检测器以一次性的方式运行，缺乏基于用户反馈细化预测的能力。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了IntRec，一个交互式目标检索框架，它基于用户反馈来细化预测。其核心是意图状态 (IS)，它维护了用于积极锚点（已确认线索）和消极约束（已拒绝假设）的双重记忆集合。一种对比对齐函数通过最大化与积极线索的相似性，同时惩罚被拒绝的线索来对候选目标进行排序，从而能够在杂乱场景中进行细粒度的消歧。我们的交互式框架在没有额外监督的情况下，显著提高了检索精度。在LVIS数据集上，IntRec达到35.4 AP，优于OVMR、CoDet和CAKE分别+2.3、+3.7和+0.5。在具有挑战性的LVIS-Ambiguous基准测试中，经过一次纠正反馈后，它比其一次性基线提高了+7.9 AP的性能，每次交互增加的延迟小于30毫秒。

title: Ori-Sense: origami capacitive sensing for soft robotic applications
summary: This work introduces Ori-Sense, a compliant capacitive sensor inspired by the inverted Kresling origami pattern. The device translates torsional deformation into measurable capacitance changes, enabling proprioceptive feedback for soft robotic systems. Using dissolvable-core molding, we fabricated a monolithic silicone structure with embedded conductive TPU electrodes, forming an integrated soft capacitor. Mechanical characterization revealed low stiffness and minimal impedance, with torque values below 0.01 N mm for axial displacements between -15 mm and 15 mm, and up to 0.03 N mm at 30 degrees twist under compression. Finite-element simulations confirmed localized stresses along fold lines and validated the measured torque-rotation response. Electrical tests showed consistent capacitance modulation up to 30%, directly correlated with the twist angle, and maximal sensitivity of S_theta ~ 0.0067 pF/deg at 5 mm of axial deformation.
tldr: This paper introduces Ori-Sense, a novel capacitive sensor inspired by origami for soft robotic proprioception, demonstrating its ability to measure torsional deformation through capacitance changes.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种名为Ori-Sense的新型电容传感器，该传感器受折纸的启发，用于软体机器人的本体感受，展示了其通过电容变化测量扭转形变的能力。
summary_zh: 本研究介绍了一种名为Ori-Sense的柔性容性传感器，其设计灵感来源于倒置的Kresling折纸结构。该设备将扭转变形转化为可测量的电容变化，从而为软体机器人系统提供本体感受反馈。我们采用可溶解内核成型技术制造了一种单片硅胶结构，并嵌入导电TPU电极，形成一个集成的软电容器。力学特性分析表明，该传感器具有较低的刚度和最小阻抗。在轴向位移为-15 mm到15 mm之间时，其扭矩值低于0.01 N mm，而在压缩条件下旋转30度时，扭矩值最高可达0.03 N mm。有限元模拟证实了沿折叠线的局部应力集中，并验证了所测量的扭矩-旋转响应。电学测试表明，电容变化值一致，最高可达30%，与旋转角度直接相关，并且在5 mm轴向变形时，最大灵敏度S_theta约为0.0067 pF/deg。

title: RoEL: Robust Event-based 3D Line Reconstruction
summary: Event cameras in motion tend to detect object boundaries or texture edges, which produce lines of brightness changes, especially in man-made environments. While lines can constitute a robust intermediate representation that is consistently observed, the sparse nature of lines may lead to drastic deterioration with minor estimation errors. Only a few previous works, often accompanied by additional sensors, utilize lines to compensate for the severe domain discrepancies of event sensors along with unpredictable noise characteristics. We propose a method that can stably extract tracks of varying appearances of lines using a clever algorithmic process that observes multiple representations from various time slices of events, compensating for potential adversaries within the event data. We then propose geometric cost functions that can refine the 3D line maps and camera poses, eliminating projective distortions and depth ambiguities. The 3D line maps are highly compact and can be equipped with our proposed cost function, which can be adapted for any observations that can detect and extract line structures or projections of them, including 3D point cloud maps or image observations. We demonstrate that our formulation is powerful enough to exhibit a significant performance boost in event-based mapping and pose refinement across diverse datasets, and can be flexibly applied to multimodal scenarios. Our results confirm that the proposed line-based formulation is a robust and effective approach for the practical deployment of event-based perceptual modules. Project page: https://gwangtak.github.io/roel/
tldr: This paper introduces RoEL, a robust method for 3D line reconstruction from event cameras, using a novel algorithmic process to extract and refine line maps, benefiting mapping and pose refinement tasks, even in multimodal settings.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种名为RoEL的鲁棒方法，用于从事件相机中进行3D线重建。 该方法采用了一种新颖的算法流程来提取和优化线地图，从而改善了地图构建和姿态优化任务，即使在多模态设置中也是如此。
summary_zh: 运动中的事件相机倾向于检测物体边界或纹理边缘，这会产生亮度变化的线，尤其是在人造环境中。虽然线可以构成一种鲁棒的中间表示，且能被持续观测到，但线的稀疏性可能导致因微小的估计误差而产生剧烈的性能下降。只有少数先前的研究，通常结合额外的传感器，利用线来补偿事件传感器严重的领域差异以及不可预测的噪声特征。我们提出了一种方法，该方法可以使用巧妙的算法流程，通过观察来自不同时间片的事件的多重表示，来稳定地提取不同外观的线段轨迹，从而补偿事件数据中的潜在干扰。然后，我们提出了几何代价函数，可以优化3D线地图和相机姿态，消除投影畸变和深度模糊。3D线地图高度紧凑，并且可以配备我们提出的代价函数，该函数可以适用于任何能够检测和提取线结构或其投影的观测，包括3D点云地图或图像观测。我们证明了我们的公式足够强大，可以在各种数据集上的基于事件的建图和姿态优化中显著提升性能，并且可以灵活地应用于多模态场景。我们的结果证实，所提出的基于线的公式是事件感知模块实际部署的一种稳健而有效的方法。项目主页：https://gwangtak.github.io/roel/

title: Dynamic Deception: When Pedestrians Team Up to Fool Autonomous Cars
summary: Many adversarial attacks on autonomous-driving perception models fail to cause system-level failures once deployed in a full driving stack. The main reason for such ineffectiveness is that once deployed in a system (e.g., within a simulator), attacks tend to be spatially or temporally short-lived, due to the vehicle's dynamics, hence rarely influencing the vehicle behaviour. In this paper, we address both limitations by introducing a system-level attack in which multiple dynamic elements (e.g., two pedestrians) carry adversarial patches (e.g., on cloths) and jointly amplify their effect through coordination and motion. We evaluate our attacks in the CARLA simulator using a state-of-the-art autonomous driving agent. At the system level, single-pedestrian attacks fail in all runs (out of 10), while dynamic collusion by two pedestrians induces full vehicle stops in up to 50\% of runs, with static collusion yielding no successful attack at all. These results show that system-level failures arise only when adversarial signals persist over time and are amplified through coordinated actors, exposing a gap between model-level robustness and end-to-end safety.
tldr: This paper introduces a system-level adversarial attack on autonomous vehicles where multiple pedestrians coordinate to amplify the effect of adversarial patches, demonstrating that coordinated attacks can lead to system-level failures even when single-pedestrian attacks do not.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种针对自动驾驶汽车的系统级对抗攻击，其中多个行人协同行动以放大对抗补丁的效果，表明即使单行人攻击不成功，协同攻击也可能导致系统级故障。
summary_zh: 许多针对自动驾驶感知模型的对抗攻击，一旦部署到完整的驾驶堆栈中，并不能引起系统级别的失效。 这种无效的主要原因是，一旦部署到系统中（例如，在模拟器中），由于车辆动力学的原因，攻击往往在空间或时间上是短暂的，因此很少影响车辆行为。 在本文中，我们通过引入一种系统级别的攻击来解决这两个局限性。 在这种攻击中，多个动态元素（例如，两个行人）携带对抗性补丁（例如，在衣服上），并通过协调和运动共同放大它们的效果。 我们在CARLA模拟器中使用最先进的自动驾驶代理来评估我们的攻击。 在系统级别，单行人攻击在所有运行中（10次运行）均失败，而两个行人的动态合谋导致高达50%的运行中车辆完全停止，而静态合谋则完全没有成功的攻击。 这些结果表明，系统级别失效仅在对抗性信号随时间持续存在并通过协调的参与者放大时才会出现，从而暴露了模型级别鲁棒性和端到端安全性之间的差距。

title: Lend me an Ear: Speech Enhancement Using a Robotic Arm with a Microphone Array
summary: Speech enhancement performance degrades significantly in noisy environments, limiting the deployment of speech-controlled technologies in industrial settings, such as manufacturing plants. Existing speech enhancement solutions primarly rely on advanced digital signal processing techniques, deep learning methods, or complex software optimization techniques. This paper introduces a novel enhancement strategy that incorporates a physical optimization stage by dynamically modifying the geometry of a microphone array to adapt to changing acoustic conditions. A sixteen-microphone array is mounted on a robotic arm manipulator with seven degrees of freedom, with microphones divided into four groups of four, including one group positioned near the end-effector. The system reconfigures the array by adjusting the manipulator joint angles to place the end-effector microphones closer to the target speaker, thereby improving the reference signal quality. This proposed method integrates sound source localization techniques, computer vision, inverse kinematics, minimum variance distortionless response beamformer and time-frequency masking using a deep neural network. Experimental results demonstrate that this approach outperforms other traditional recording configruations, achieving higher scale-invariant signal-to-distortion ratio and lower word error rate accross multiple input signal-to-noise ratio conditions.
tldr: The paper presents a speech enhancement system that uses a robotic arm to dynamically reposition a microphone array, improving audio quality in noisy environments by physically optimizing microphone placement.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种语音增强系统，该系统使用机械臂动态地重新定位麦克风阵列，通过物理优化麦克风的位置来提高嘈杂环境中的音频质量。
summary_zh: 在嘈杂环境中，语音增强的性能会显著下降，限制了语音控制技术在工业环境（如制造工厂）中的部署。现有的语音增强解决方案主要依赖于先进的数字信号处理技术、深度学习方法或复杂的软件优化技术。本文介绍了一种新颖的增强策略，该策略通过动态修改麦克风阵列的几何结构以适应变化的声学条件，从而结合了一个物理优化阶段。一个由16个麦克风组成的阵列被安装在具有七个自由度的机器人手臂机械手上，其中麦克风被分成四组，每组四个，包括一组位于末端执行器附近。该系统通过调整机械手关节角度来重新配置阵列，使末端执行器麦克风更靠近目标说话者，从而提高参考信号的质量。该方法集成了声源定位技术、计算机视觉、逆运动学、最小方差无失真响应波束形成器和使用深度神经网络的时频掩蔽。实验结果表明，该方法优于其他传统的录音配置，在多种输入信噪比条件下，实现了更高的尺度不变信号失真比和更低的词错误率。

title: Mean-Field Reinforcement Learning without Synchrony
summary: Mean-field reinforcement learning (MF-RL) scales multi-agent RL to large populations by reducing each agent's dependence on others to a single summary statistic -- the mean action. However, this reduction requires every agent to act at every time step; when some agents are idle, the mean action is simply undefined. Addressing asynchrony therefore requires a different summary statistic -- one that remains defined regardless of which agents act. The population distribution $μ\in Δ(\mathcal{O})$ -- the fraction of agents at each observation -- satisfies this requirement: its dimension is independent of $N$, and under exchangeability it fully determines each agent's reward and transition. Existing MF-RL theory, however, is built on the mean action and does not extend to $μ$. We therefore construct the Temporal Mean Field (TMF) framework around the population distribution $μ$ from scratch, covering the full spectrum from fully synchronous to purely sequential decision-making within a single theory. We prove existence and uniqueness of TMF equilibria, establish an $O(1/\sqrt{N})$ finite-population approximation bound that holds regardless of how many agents act per step, and prove convergence of a policy gradient algorithm (TMF-PG) to the unique equilibrium. Experiments on a resource selection game and a dynamic queueing game confirm that TMF-PG achieves near-identical performance whether one agent or all $N$ act per step, with approximation error decaying at the predicted $O(1/\sqrt{N})$ rate.
tldr: This paper introduces the Temporal Mean Field (TMF) framework to address asynchronous agent activity in mean-field reinforcement learning by using the population distribution as a summary statistic, proving convergence and demonstrating its effectiveness in experiments.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了时间平均场（TMF）框架，通过使用人口分布作为总结统计量来解决平均场强化学习中的异步代理活动问题，证明了其收敛性并在实验中展示了其有效性。
summary_zh: 平均场强化学习（MF-RL）通过将每个智能体对其他智能体的依赖简化为一个单一的总结统计量——平均动作，从而将多智能体强化学习扩展到大规模群体。然而，这种简化要求每个智能体在每个时间步都采取行动；当一些智能体处于空闲状态时，平均动作将无法定义。因此，要解决异步性问题，就需要不同的总结统计量——一种无论哪些智能体采取行动都保持定义的统计量。群体分布$μ\in Δ(\mathcal{O})$——即每个观察状态下的智能体占比——满足此要求：其维度与$N$无关，并且在可交换性（exchangeability）条件下，它完全决定了每个智能体的奖励和转移。然而，现有的MF-RL理论建立在平均动作的基础上，无法扩展到$μ$。因此，我们围绕群体分布$μ$，从头开始构建了时间平均场（TMF）框架，涵盖了从完全同步到纯粹顺序决策的完整范围，并将它们统一在同一理论中。我们证明了TMF均衡的存在性和唯一性，建立了$O(1/\sqrt{N})$的有限群体近似界限，该界限与每个步骤中采取行动的智能体数量无关，并证明了策略梯度算法（TMF-PG）收敛到唯一的均衡。在资源选择博弈和动态排队博弈上的实验证实，无论一个或所有$N$个智能体在每个步骤中采取行动，TMF-PG都能实现几乎相同的性能，且近似误差以预测的$O(1/\sqrt{N})$速率衰减。

title: PHAST: Port-Hamiltonian Architecture for Structured Temporal Dynamics Forecasting
summary: Real physical systems are dissipative -- a pendulum slows, a circuit loses charge to heat -- and forecasting their dynamics from partial observations is a central challenge in scientific machine learning. We address the \emph{position-only} (q-only) problem: given only generalized positions~$q_t$ at discrete times (momenta~$p_t$ latent), learn a structured model that (a)~produces stable long-horizon forecasts and (b)~recovers physically meaningful parameters when sufficient structure is provided. The port-Hamiltonian framework makes the conservative-dissipative split explicit via $\dot{x}=(J-R)\nabla H(x)$, guaranteeing $dH/dt\le 0$ when $R\succeq 0$. We introduce \textbf{PHAST} (Port-Hamiltonian Architecture for Structured Temporal dynamics), which decomposes the Hamiltonian into potential~$V(q)$, mass~$M(q)$, and damping~$D(q)$ across three knowledge regimes (KNOWN, PARTIAL, UNKNOWN), uses efficient low-rank PSD/SPD parameterizations, and advances dynamics with Strang splitting. Across thirteen q-only benchmarks spanning mechanical, electrical, molecular, thermal, gravitational, and ecological systems, PHAST achieves the best long-horizon forecasting among competitive baselines and enables physically meaningful parameter recovery when the regime provides sufficient anchors. We show that identification is fundamentally ill-posed without such anchors (gauge freedom), motivating a two-axis evaluation that separates forecasting stability from identifiability.
tldr: The paper introduces PHAST, a port-Hamiltonian neural network architecture for stable long-horizon forecasting of physical systems from position-only data, demonstrating superior performance and physically meaningful parameter recovery with sufficient structural anchors.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了PHAST，一种端口-哈密顿神经网络架构，用于从仅有位置数据的物理系统的稳定长期预测，并证明了在具有足够的结构锚点的情况下，卓越的性能和具有物理意义的参数恢复。
summary_zh: 真实物理系统是耗散的——一个钟摆会减速，一个电路会因为产生热量而损失电荷——并且从部分观测数据预测它们的动力学是科学机器学习中的一个核心挑战。我们针对仅有广义位置（q-only）的问题展开研究：给定离散时间点的广义位置~$q_t$（动量~$p_t$是隐变量），学习一个结构化模型，该模型（a）产生稳定的长时程预测，并且（b）在提供足够的结构时恢复具有物理意义的参数。port-Hamiltonian框架通过$\dot{x}=(J-R)\nabla H(x)$显式地分离保守-耗散部分，当$R\succeq 0$时保证$dH/dt\le 0$。我们引入了\textbf{PHAST}（用于结构化时间动力学的Port-Hamiltonian架构），它将Hamiltonian分解为势能~$V(q)$、质量~$M(q)$和阻尼~$D(q)$，横跨三种知识状态（已知、部分已知、未知），使用高效的低秩PSD/SPD参数化，并且使用Strang分裂推进动力学。在跨越机械、电气、分子、热、重力和生态系统的13个仅有广义位置的基准测试中，PHAST在竞争基线中实现了最佳的长时程预测，并且当知识状态提供足够的锚点时，能够恢复具有物理意义的参数。我们表明，如果没有这些锚点（规范自由度），辨识在根本上是不适定的，这促使我们采用双轴评估，将预测稳定性与可辨识性分开。

title: In-Context Learning for Pure Exploration in Continuous Spaces
summary: In active sequential testing, also termed pure exploration, a learner is tasked with the goal to adaptively acquire information so as to identify an unknown ground-truth hypothesis with as few queries as possible. This problem, originally studied by Chernoff in 1959, has several applications: classical formulations include Best-Arm Identification (BAI) in bandits, where actions index hypotheses, and generalized search problems, where strategically chosen queries reveal partial information about a hidden label. In many modern settings, however, the hypothesis space is continuous and naturally coincides with the query/action space: for example, identifying an optimal action in a continuous-armed bandit, localizing an $ε$-ball contained in a target region, or estimating the minimizer of an unknown function from a sequence of observations. In this work, we study pure exploration in such continuous spaces and introduce Continuous In-Context Pure Exploration for this regime. We introduce C-ICPE-TS, an algorithm that meta-trains deep neural policies to map observation histories to (i) the next continuous query action and (ii) a predicted hypothesis, thereby learning transferable sequential testing strategies directly from data. At inference time, C-ICPE-TS actively gathers evidence on previously unseen tasks and infers the true hypothesis without parameter updates or explicit hand-crafted information models. We validate C-ICPE-TS across a range of benchmarks, spanning continuous best-arm identification, region localization, and function minimizer identification.
tldr: The paper proposes C-ICPE-TS, an algorithm that uses in-context learning to address pure exploration in continuous spaces, enabling efficient identification of hypotheses without parameter updates across various continuous optimization tasks.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了 C-ICPE-TS 算法，它利用上下文学习来解决连续空间中的纯探索问题，从而能够有效地识别假设，无需参数更新，适用于各种连续优化任务。
summary_zh: 在主动序列测试（也称为纯探索）中，学习者的任务是以尽可能少的查询次数自适应地获取信息，从而识别出一个未知的真实假设。这个问题最初由Chernoff在1959年研究，并有若干应用：经典表述包括bandit中的最佳臂识别（BAI），其中动作索引假设；以及广义搜索问题，其中策略性选择的查询揭示关于隐藏标签的部分信息。然而，在许多现代设置中，假设空间是连续的，并且自然地与查询/动作空间重合：例如，识别一个连续臂bandit中的最优动作，定位包含在目标区域内的 $ε$-球，或者从一系列观测中估计一个未知函数的最小值。在这项工作中，我们研究了这种连续空间中的纯探索，并为此引入了连续上下文纯探索。我们提出了C-ICPE-TS，这是一种元训练深度神经策略的算法，它将观测历史映射到 (i) 下一个连续查询动作，以及 (ii) 一个预测假设，从而直接从数据中学习可迁移的序列测试策略。在推理时，C-ICPE-TS主动收集关于先前未见过任务的证据，并推断出真实假设，无需参数更新或显式的手工设计的信息模型。我们在涵盖连续最佳臂识别、区域定位和函数最小值识别的一系列基准上验证了C-ICPE-TS的有效性。

title: Adapting Actively on the Fly: Relevance-Guided Online Meta-Learning with Latent Concepts for Geospatial Discovery
summary: In many real-world settings, such as environmental monitoring, disaster response, or public health, with costly and difficult data collection and dynamic environments, strategically sampling from unobserved regions is essential for efficiently uncovering hidden targets under tight resource constraints. Yet, sparse and biased geospatial ground truth limits the applicability of existing learning-based methods, such as reinforcement learning. To address this, we propose a unified geospatial discovery framework that integrates active learning, online meta-learning, and concept-guided reasoning. Our approach introduces two key innovations built on a shared notion of *concept relevance*, which captures how domain-specific factors influence target presence: a *concept-weighted uncertainty sampling strategy*, where uncertainty is modulated by learned relevance based on readily-available domain-specific concepts (e.g., land cover, source proximity); and a *relevance-aware meta-batch formation strategy* that promotes semantic diversity during online-meta updates, improving generalization in dynamic environments. Our experiments include testing on a real-world dataset of cancer-causing PFAS (Per- and polyfluoroalkyl substances) contamination, showcasing our method's reliability at uncovering targets with limited data and a varying environment.
tldr: The paper introduces a geospatial discovery framework combining active learning, online meta-learning, and concept-guided reasoning to efficiently uncover hidden targets in dynamic environments with limited data, demonstrated on PFAS contamination.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了一个地理空间发现框架，结合主动学习、在线元学习和概念引导推理，以在动态环境中利用有限的数据有效地发现隐藏目标，并在 PFAS 污染方面进行了演示。
summary_zh: 在许多现实世界的场景中，例如环境监测、灾难响应或公共卫生，由于数据收集成本高昂、难度大且环境动态变化，策略性地从未观测到的区域进行采样对于在有限的资源约束下高效地发现隐藏目标至关重要。然而，稀疏且有偏见的地理空间真值限制了现有基于学习方法（例如强化学习）的适用性。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种统一的地理空间发现框架，该框架集成了主动学习、在线元学习和概念引导推理。我们的方法引入了两项关键创新，它们都基于一个共同的*概念相关性*概念，该概念捕捉了特定领域的因素如何影响目标的出现：一个*概念加权的不确定性采样策略*，其中不确定性通过基于易于获得的特定领域概念（例如，土地覆盖、源邻近度）学习到的相关性进行调节；以及一个*相关性感知的元批次形成策略*，该策略促进在线元更新期间的语义多样性，从而提高在动态环境中的泛化能力。我们的实验包括对一个真实的致癌 PFAS（全氟和多氟烷基物质）污染数据集进行测试，展示了我们的方法在有限数据和变化的环境中发现目标的可靠性。

title: Faster Training, Fewer Labels: Self-Supervised Pretraining for Fine-Grained BEV Segmentation
summary: Dense Bird's Eye View (BEV) semantic maps are central to autonomous driving, yet current multi-camera methods depend on costly, inconsistently annotated BEV ground truth. We address this limitation with a two-phase training strategy for fine-grained road marking segmentation that removes full supervision during pretraining and halves the amount of training data during fine-tuning while still outperforming the comparable supervised baseline model. During the self-supervised pretraining, BEVFormer predictions are differentiably reprojected into the image plane and trained against multi-view semantic pseudo-labels generated by the widely used semantic segmentation model Mask2Former. A temporal loss encourages consistency across frames. The subsequent supervised fine-tuning phase requires only 50% of the dataset and significantly less training time. With our method, the fine-tuning benefits from rich priors learned during pretraining boosting the performance and BEV segmentation quality (up to +2.5pp mIoU over the fully supervised baseline) on nuScenes. It simultaneously halves the usage of annotation data and reduces total training time by up to two thirds. The results demonstrate that differentiable reprojection plus camera perspective pseudo labels yields transferable BEV features and a scalable path toward reduced-label autonomous perception.
tldr: The paper presents a self-supervised pretraining method for BEV segmentation that uses differentiable reprojection and multi-view pseudo-labels, achieving better performance with half the labeled data and reduced training time compared to a fully supervised baseline.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种用于BEV分割的自监督预训练方法，该方法使用可微重投影和多视角伪标签，与完全监督的基线相比，以一半的标记数据和更少的训练时间实现了更好的性能。
summary_zh: 密集的鸟瞰图（BEV）语义地图是自动驾驶的核心，但目前的多摄像头方法依赖于昂贵的、标注不一致的BEV真值数据。我们提出了一种用于精细道路标线分割的两阶段训练策略，克服了这一限制。该策略在预训练阶段移除了完全监督，并在微调阶段将训练数据量减半，同时仍然优于可比的监督基线模型。在自监督预训练期间，BEVFormer的预测被可微地重投影到图像平面上，并针对由广泛使用的语义分割模型Mask2Former生成的多视角语义伪标签进行训练。时间损失鼓励跨帧的一致性。后续的监督微调阶段只需要50%的数据集，并显著减少训练时间。通过我们的方法，微调阶段受益于预训练期间学习到的丰富先验知识，从而提升了性能和BEV分割质量（在nuScenes上比完全监督的基线提高了高达+2.5个百分点的mIoU）。该方法同时将标注数据的使用量减半，并将总训练时间减少高达三分之二。结果表明，可微重投影加上相机视角伪标签可以产生可迁移的BEV特征，并为减少标注的自动驾驶感知提供了一条可扩展的途径。

title: Promptable segmentation with region exploration enables minimal-effort expert-level prostate cancer delineation
summary:
Purpose: Accurate segmentation of prostate cancer on magnetic resonance (MR) images is crucial for planning image-guided interventions such as targeted biopsies, cryoablation, and radiotherapy. However, subtle and variable tumour appearances, differences in imaging protocols, and limited expert availability make consistent interpretation difficult. While automated methods aim to address this, they rely on large expertly-annotated datasets that are often inconsistent, whereas manual delineation remains labour-intensive. This work aims to bridge the gap between automated and manual segmentation through a framework driven by user-provided point prompts, enabling accurate segmentation with minimal annotation effort.
  Methods: The framework combines reinforcement learning (RL) with a region-growing segmentation process guided by user prompts. Starting from an initial point prompt, region-growing generates a preliminary segmentation, which is iteratively refined through RL. At each step, the RL agent observes the image and current segmentation to predict a new point, from which region growing updates the mask. A reward, balancing segmentation accuracy and voxel-wise uncertainty, encourages exploration of ambiguous regions, allowing the agent to escape local optima and perform sample-specific optimisation. Despite requiring fully supervised training, the framework bridges manual and fully automated segmentation at inference by substantially reducing user effort while outperforming current fully automated methods.
  Results: The framework was evaluated on two public prostate MR datasets (PROMIS and PICAI, with 566 and 1090 cases). It outperformed the previous best automated methods by 9.9% and 8.9%, respectively, with performance comparable to manual radiologist segmentation, reducing annotation time tenfold.
tldr: This paper presents a reinforcement learning-based framework for prostate cancer segmentation on MR images, guided by user-provided point prompts, achieving expert-level accuracy with significantly reduced annotation effort and outperforming existing automated methods.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于强化学习的前列腺癌MR图像分割框架，该框架由用户提供的点提示引导，以显著减少的标注工作量实现了专家级别的准确性，并优于现有的自动化方法。
summary_zh:
目的： 前列腺癌在磁共振(MR)图像上的准确分割对于规划图像引导干预至关重要，例如靶向活检、冷冻消融和放射治疗。然而，肿瘤外观的细微性和可变性、成像协议的差异以及有限的专家资源使得一致的判读变得困难。尽管自动化方法旨在解决这个问题，但它们依赖于大型专家标注数据集，而这些数据集往往不一致，而手动勾画仍然耗时费力。这项工作旨在通过一个由用户提供的点提示驱动的框架，弥合自动化和手动分割之间的差距，从而以最小的标注工作量实现准确的分割。
方法： 该框架将强化学习(RL)与用户提示引导的区域生长分割过程相结合。从初始点提示开始，区域生长生成一个初步分割，并通过强化学习进行迭代优化。在每个步骤中，强化学习智能体观察图像和当前分割，以预测一个新的点，然后区域生长根据该点更新掩膜。一个平衡分割准确率和体素级不确定性的奖励机制，鼓励探索模糊区域，允许智能体逃脱局部最优并执行样本特异性优化。尽管需要全监督训练，但该框架通过大幅减少用户工作量，并在推理时优于当前的全自动化方法，从而弥合了手动和全自动化分割之间的差距。
结果： 该框架在两个公共前列腺磁共振数据集（PROMIS和PICAI，分别包含566和1090个病例）上进行了评估。它分别优于之前的最佳自动化方法9.9%和8.9%，其性能与手动放射科医师分割相当，并将标注时间缩短了十倍。

title: VidEoMT: Your ViT is Secretly Also a Video Segmentation Model
summary: Existing online video segmentation models typically combine a per-frame segmenter with complex specialized tracking modules. While effective, these modules introduce significant architectural complexity and computational overhead. Recent studies suggest that plain Vision Transformer (ViT) encoders, when scaled with sufficient capacity and large-scale pre-training, can conduct accurate image segmentation without requiring specialized modules. Motivated by this observation, we propose the Video Encoder-only Mask Transformer (VidEoMT), a simple encoder-only video segmentation model that eliminates the need for dedicated tracking modules. To enable temporal modeling in an encoder-only ViT, VidEoMT introduces a lightweight query propagation mechanism that carries information across frames by reusing queries from the previous frame. To balance this with adaptability to new content, it employs a query fusion strategy that combines the propagated queries with a set of temporally-agnostic learned queries. As a result, VidEoMT attains the benefits of a tracker without added complexity, achieving competitive accuracy while being 5x--10x faster, running at up to 160 FPS with a ViT-L backbone. Code: https://www.tue-mps.org/videomt/
tldr: The paper presents VidEoMT, a simple and efficient encoder-only video segmentation model using a Vision Transformer with a novel query propagation mechanism, achieving competitive accuracy while significantly improving speed.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了 VidEoMT，一个简单高效的仅编码器视频分割模型，它使用带有新型查询传播机制的 Vision Transformer，在显著提高速度的同时，实现了具有竞争力的准确性。
summary_zh: 现有在线视频分割模型通常将逐帧分割器与复杂的专用跟踪模块相结合。虽然有效，但这些模块引入了显著的架构复杂性和计算开销。最新的研究表明，纯粹的视觉 Transformer (ViT) 编码器，在经过足够容量的扩展和大规模预训练后，无需专用模块即可进行准确的图像分割。受此启发，我们提出了视频编码器式掩码 Transformer (VidEoMT)，这是一种简单的纯编码器视频分割模型，消除了对专用跟踪模块的需求。为了在纯编码器 ViT 中实现时间建模，VidEoMT 引入了一种轻量级的查询传播机制，通过重用前一帧的查询来跨帧传递信息。为了平衡这一点并适应新内容，它采用了一种查询融合策略，将传播的查询与一组时间无关的学习查询相结合。因此，VidEoMT 在不增加复杂性的前提下获得了跟踪器的优势，实现了具有竞争力的精度，同时速度提高了 5 到 10 倍，使用 ViT-L 主干网络运行时高达 160 FPS。代码：https://www.tue-mps.org/videomt/

title: TempoNet: Slack-Quantized Transformer-Guided Reinforcement Scheduler for Adaptive Deadline-Centric Real-Time Dispatchs
summary: Real-time schedulers must reason about tight deadlines under strict compute budgets. We present TempoNet, a reinforcement learning scheduler that pairs a permutation-invariant Transformer with a deep Q-approximation. An Urgency Tokenizer discretizes temporal slack into learnable embeddings, stabilizing value learning and capturing deadline proximity. A latency-aware sparse attention stack with blockwise top-k selection and locality-sensitive chunking enables global reasoning over unordered task sets with near-linear scaling and sub-millisecond inference. A multicore mapping layer converts contextualized Q-scores into processor assignments through masked-greedy selection or differentiable matching. Extensive evaluations on industrial mixed-criticality traces and large multiprocessor settings show consistent gains in deadline fulfillment over analytic schedulers and neural baselines, together with improved optimization stability. Diagnostics include sensitivity analyses for slack quantization, attention-driven policy interpretation, hardware-in-the-loop and kernel micro-benchmarks, and robustness under stress with simple runtime mitigations; we also report sample-efficiency benefits from behavioral-cloning pretraining and compatibility with an actor-critic variant without altering the inference pipeline. These results establish a practical framework for Transformer-based decision making in high-throughput real-time scheduling.
tldr: TempoNet is a reinforcement learning scheduler using a Transformer architecture for real-time task dispatch, achieving improved deadline fulfillment and stability in industrial settings.
tldr_zh: TempoNet是一个使用Transformer架构的强化学习调度器，用于实时任务分配，在工业环境中实现了改进的截止日期履行和稳定性。
summary_zh: 实时调度器必须在严格的计算预算下，对严格的时限进行推理。我们提出了TempoNet，一个强化学习调度器，它将一个排列不变的Transformer与一个深度Q近似相结合。一个Urgency Tokenizer（紧迫性分词器）将时间裕度离散化为可学习的嵌入，从而稳定了价值学习并捕获了截止期限的邻近性。一个具有块状top-k选择和局部敏感分块的延迟感知稀疏注意力堆栈，能够对无序任务集进行全局推理，具有近似线性的扩展性以及亚毫秒级的推理速度。一个多核映射层通过掩码贪婪选择或可微匹配将上下文相关的Q值转换为处理器分配。在工业混合关键程度的跟踪以及大型多处理器环境下的广泛评估表明，与分析调度器和神经基线相比，在截止期限实现方面取得了持续的提升，同时优化稳定性也得到了改善。诊断包括针对裕度量化的敏感性分析、注意力驱动的策略解释、硬件在环和内核微基准测试，以及在压力下通过简单运行时缓解措施实现的鲁棒性；我们还报告了来自行为克隆预训练的样本效率优势，以及与行为者-评论家变体的兼容性，而无需改变推理流程。这些结果建立了一个基于Transformer的决策在高性能实时调度中的实用框架。

title: Downwash-aware Configuration Optimization for Modular Aerial Systems
summary: This work proposes a framework that generates and optimally selects task-specific assembly configurations for a large group of homogeneous modular aerial systems, explicitly enforcing bounds on inter-module downwash. Prior work largely focuses on planar layouts and often ignores aerodynamic interference. In contrast, firstly we enumerate non-isomorphic connection topologies at scale; secondly, we solve a nonlinear program to check feasibility and select the configuration that minimizes control input subject to actuation limits and downwash constraints. We evaluate the framework in physics-based simulation and demonstrate it in real-world experiments.
tldr: This paper presents a framework for optimizing the configuration of modular aerial systems, specifically addressing downwash interference between modules. It enumerates topologies and uses nonlinear programming to select the best configuration, validated through simulations and real-world experiments.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一个框架，用于优化模块化飞行器的配置，特别关注模块之间的下洗干扰。它枚举了拓扑结构，并使用非线性规划来选择最佳配置，并通过仿真和实际实验进行了验证。
summary_zh: 本文提出了一种框架，该框架能够为大量同构模块化空中系统生成并优化选择特定任务的装配配置，并明确强制执行模块间下洗流的约束。先前的研究主要集中在平面布局上，并且常常忽略空气动力干扰。与此不同，首先，我们大规模地枚举非同构连接拓扑结构；其次，我们求解一个非线性规划问题，以检查可行性并选择在满足驱动限制和下洗流约束的条件下使控制输入最小化的配置。我们在基于物理的仿真中评估该框架，并在实际实验中进行了演示。

title: Tendon-Driven Reciprocating and Non-Reciprocating Motion via Snapping Metabeams
summary: Snapping beams enable rapid geometric transitions through nonlinear instability, offering an efficient means of generating motion in soft robotic systems. In this study, a tendon-driven mechanism consisting of spiral-based metabeams was developed to exploit this principle for producing both reciprocating and non-reciprocating motion. The snapping structures were fabricated using fused deposition modeling with polylactic acid (PLA) and experimentally tested under different boundary conditions to analyze their nonlinear behavior. The results show that the mechanical characteristics, including critical forces and stability, can be tuned solely by adjusting the boundary constraints. The spiral geometry allows large reversible deformation even when made from a relatively stiff material such as PLA, providing a straightforward design concept for controllable snapping behavior. The developed mechanism was further integrated into a swimming robot, where tendon-driven fins exhibited two distinct actuation modes: reciprocating and non-reciprocating motion. The latter enabled efficient propulsion, producing a forward displacement of about 32 mm per 0.4 s cycle ($\approx$ 81 mm/s, equivalent to 0.4 body lengths per second). This study highlights the potential of geometry-driven snapping structures for efficient and programmable actuation in soft robotic systems.
tldr: This paper presents a tendon-driven soft robotic mechanism using snapping metabeams for generating both reciprocating and non-reciprocating motion, demonstrating efficient propulsion in a swimming robot.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种基于卷曲变稳梁的腱驱动软体机器人机制，用于产生往复和非往复运动，并展示了其在游泳机器人中的高效推进能力。
summary_zh: 屈曲梁通过非线性不稳定性实现快速的几何转变，为软体机器人系统提供了一种高效的运动生成方式。本研究开发了一种基于螺旋超材料梁的腱驱动机构，利用该原理产生往复和非往复运动。屈曲结构采用熔融沉积成型法结合聚乳酸（PLA）制造，并在不同边界条件下进行实验测试，以分析其非线性行为。结果表明，仅通过调整边界约束即可调控包括临界力和稳定性在内的机械特性。螺旋几何结构即使采用相对刚硬的材料（如PLA）也能实现大的可逆形变，为可控屈曲行为提供了一种直接的设计理念。该机构进一步集成到游泳机器人中，其中腱驱动鳍表现出两种不同的驱动模式：往复运动和非往复运动。后者实现了高效的推进，每个0.4秒周期产生约32毫米的前向位移（约为81毫米/秒，相当于每秒0.4倍体长）。本研究突出了几何驱动的屈曲结构在软体机器人系统中实现高效且可编程驱动的潜力。

title: Diff2DGS: Reliable Reconstruction of Occluded Surgical Scenes via 2D Gaussian Splatting
summary: Real-time reconstruction of deformable surgical scenes is vital for advancing robotic surgery, improving surgeon guidance, and enabling automation. Recent methods achieve dense reconstructions from da Vinci robotic surgery videos, with Gaussian Splatting (GS) offering real-time performance via graphics acceleration. However, reconstruction quality in occluded regions remains limited, and depth accuracy has not been fully assessed, as benchmarks like EndoNeRF and StereoMIS lack 3D ground truth. We propose Diff2DGS, a novel two-stage framework for reliable 3D reconstruction of occluded surgical scenes. In the first stage, a diffusion-based video module with temporal priors inpaints tissue occluded by instruments with high spatial-temporal consistency. In the second stage, we adapt 2D Gaussian Splatting (2DGS) with a Learnable Deformation Model (LDM) to capture dynamic tissue deformation and anatomical geometry. We also extend evaluation beyond prior image-quality metrics by performing quantitative depth accuracy analysis on the SCARED dataset. Diff2DGS outperforms state-of-the-art approaches in both appearance and geometry, reaching 38.02 dB PSNR on EndoNeRF and 34.40 dB on StereoMIS. Furthermore, our experiments demonstrate that optimizing for image quality alone does not necessarily translate into optimal 3D reconstruction accuracy. To address this, we further optimize the depth quality of the reconstructed 3D results, ensuring more faithful geometry in addition to high-fidelity appearance.
tldr: The paper introduces Diff2DGS, a two-stage framework using diffusion-based video inpainting and 2D Gaussian Splatting with a learnable deformation model for reliable 3D reconstruction of occluded surgical scenes, improving both appearance and geometric accuracy.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种名为Diff2DGS的两阶段框架，该框架使用基于扩散的视频修复技术和带有可学习形变模型的2D高斯溅射，用于可靠地重建遮挡的手术场景的3D模型，从而提高外观和几何精度。
summary_zh: 对可变形外科场景进行实时重建对于推进机器人手术、改进外科医生引导以及实现自动化至关重要。最近的方法利用达芬奇机器人手术视频实现了密集重建，其中高斯溅射 (GS) 通过图形加速提供了实时性能。然而，遮挡区域的重建质量仍然有限，并且深度精度尚未得到充分评估，因为像 EndoNeRF 和 StereoMIS 这样的基准缺乏 3D 真值。我们提出 Diff2DGS，一种用于可靠的遮挡外科场景 3D 重建的新型两阶段框架。在第一阶段，具有时间先验的基于扩散的视频模块使用高度时空一致性来修复被器械遮挡的组织。在第二阶段，我们采用带有可学习形变模型 (LDM) 的 2D 高斯溅射 (2DGS) 来捕获动态组织形变和解剖几何结构。我们还通过在 SCARED 数据集上进行定量深度精度分析，将评估范围扩展到先前的图像质量指标之外。Diff2DGS 在外观和几何形状方面均优于最先进的方法，在 EndoNeRF 上达到 38.02 dB PSNR，在 StereoMIS 上达到 34.40 dB。此外，我们的实验表明，仅优化图像质量不一定转化为最佳的 3D 重建精度。为了解决这个问题，我们进一步优化了重建的 3D 结果的深度质量，除了高保真外观之外，还确保了更真实的几何形状。

title: Quasi-Periodic Gaussian Process Predictive Iterative Learning Control
summary: Repetitive motion tasks are common in robotics, but performance can degrade over time due to environmental changes and robot wear and tear. Iterative learning control (ILC) improves performance by using information from previous iterations to compensate for expected errors in future iterations. This work incorporates the use of Quasi-Periodic Gaussian Processes (QPGPs) into a predictive ILC framework to model and forecast disturbances and drift across iterations. Using a recent structural equation formulation of QPGPs, the proposed approach enables efficient inference with complexity $\mathcal{O}(p^3)$ instead of $\mathcal{O}(i^2p^3)$, where $p$ denotes the number of points within an iteration and $i$ represents the total number of iterations, specially for larger $i$. This formulation also enables parameter estimation without loss of information, making continual GP learning computationally feasible within the control loop. By predicting next-iteration error profiles rather than relying only on past errors, the controller achieves faster convergence and maintains this under time-varying disturbances. We benchmark the method against both standard ILC and conventional Gaussian Process (GP)-based predictive ILC on three tasks, autonomous vehicle trajectory tracking, a three-link robotic manipulator, and a real-world Stretch robot experiment. Across all cases, the proposed approach converges faster and remains robust under injected and natural disturbances while reducing computational cost. This highlights its practicality across a range of repetitive dynamical systems.
tldr: This paper introduces a Quasi-Periodic Gaussian Process (QPGP) based predictive Iterative Learning Control (ILC) method that improves convergence speed and robustness in repetitive robotic tasks while reducing computational cost compared to standard and GP-based ILC.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种基于准周期高斯过程（QPGP）的预测迭代学习控制（ILC）方法，与标准和基于GP的ILC相比，该方法提高了重复性机器人任务中的收敛速度和鲁棒性，同时降低了计算成本。
summary_zh: 重复运动任务在机器人学中很常见，但由于环境变化和机器人磨损，性能会随着时间推移而下降。迭代学习控制（ILC）通过利用先前迭代的信息来补偿未来迭代中的预期误差，从而提高性能。这项工作将准周期高斯过程（QPGP）集成到预测性ILC框架中，以建模和预测跨迭代的扰动和漂移。利用最近QPGP的结构方程公式，该方法能够进行高效的推理，复杂度为 $\mathcal{O}(p^3)$，而不是 $\mathcal{O}(i^2p^3)$，其中 $p$ 表示单次迭代中的点数，$i$ 表示总迭代次数，尤其适用于较大的 $i$。这种公式还可以在不损失信息的情况下进行参数估计，从而使连续GP学习在控制回路中具有计算可行性。通过预测下一次迭代的误差曲线，而不是仅依赖于过去的误差，控制器可以实现更快的收敛速度，并在时变扰动下保持这种收敛。我们在三个任务上对该方法与标准ILC和传统的基于高斯过程（GP）的预测性ILC进行了基准测试，分别是无人车轨迹跟踪、三连杆机器人机械臂和一个真实世界的Stretch机器人实验。在所有情况下，所提出的方法收敛速度更快，并在注入的和自然的扰动下保持鲁棒性，同时降低了计算成本。这突出了其在各种重复动力系统中的实用性。

title: Homotopic information gain for sparse active target tracking
summary: The problem of planning sensing trajectories for a mobile robot to collect observations of a target and predict its future trajectory is known as active target tracking. Enabled by probabilistic motion models, one may solve this problem by exploring the belief space of all trajectory predictions given future sensing actions to maximise information gain. However, for multi-modal motion models the notion of information gain is often ill-defined. This paper proposes a planning approach designed around maximising information regarding the target's homotopy class, or high-level motion. We introduce homotopic information gain, a measure of the expected high-level trajectory information given by a measurement. We show that homotopic information gain is a lower bound for metric or low-level information gain, and is as sparsely distributed in the environment as obstacles are. Planning sensing trajectories to maximise homotopic information results in highly accurate trajectory estimates with fewer measurements than a metric information approach, as supported by our empirical evaluation on real and simulated pedestrian data.
tldr: This paper introduces 'homotopic information gain' for active target tracking, proposing it as a more robust and efficient metric than traditional information gain, especially for multi-modal motion models in environments with obstacles.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了一种名为“同伦信息增益”的主动目标跟踪方法。相比于传统的信息增益，该方法在高动态和存在障碍物的环境中，对解决多模态运动模型的问题更加稳健和高效。
summary_zh: 针对移动机器人收集目标观测并预测其未来轨迹的规划传感轨迹问题，被称为主动目标跟踪。在概率运动模型的支持下，可以通过探索在给定未来传感动作的情况下，所有轨迹预测的信念空间，最大化信息增益来解决此问题。然而，对于多模态运动模型，信息增益的概念通常定义不明确。本文提出了一种规划方法，旨在最大化关于目标同伦类或高层运动的信息。我们引入了同伦信息增益，这是一种由测量值提供的预期高层轨迹信息的度量。我们证明了同伦信息增益是度量或低层信息增益的下界，并且像障碍物一样在环境中稀疏分布。规划传感轨迹以最大化同伦信息可实现高度精确的轨迹估计，且与度量信息方法相比，所需的测量次数更少，我们对真实和模拟行人数据的实证评估支持了这一结论。

title: Unifying Color and Lightness Correction with View-Adaptive Curve Adjustment for Robust 3D Novel View Synthesis
summary: High-quality image acquisition in real-world environments remains challenging due to complex illumination variations and inherent limitations of camera imaging pipelines. These issues are exacerbated in multi-view capture, where differences in lighting, sensor responses, and image signal processor (ISP) configurations introduce photometric and chromatic inconsistencies that violate the assumptions of photometric consistency underlying modern 3D novel view synthesis (NVS) methods, including Neural Radiance Fields (NeRF) and 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS), leading to degraded reconstruction and rendering quality. We propose Luminance-GS++, a 3DGS-based framework for robust NVS under diverse illumination conditions. Our method combines a globally view-adaptive lightness adjustment with a local pixel-wise residual refinement for precise color correction. We further design unsupervised objectives that jointly enforce lightness correction and multi-view geometric and photometric consistency. Extensive experiments demonstrate state-of-the-art performance across challenging scenarios, including low-light, overexposure, and complex luminance and chromatic variations. Unlike prior approaches that modify the underlying representation, our method preserves the explicit 3DGS formulation, improving reconstruction fidelity while maintaining real-time rendering efficiency.
tldr: The paper introduces Luminance-GS++, a 3DGS-based framework for robust novel view synthesis under diverse illumination conditions by combining view-adaptive lightness adjustment and pixel-wise refinement, achieving state-of-the-art performance.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了Luminance-GS++，一个基于3DGS的框架，通过结合视图自适应的亮度调整和像素级的细化，实现在各种光照条件下鲁棒的新视角合成，并取得了最先进的性能。
summary_zh: 在真实环境中获取高质量图像仍然具有挑战性，这归因于复杂的光照变化和相机成像流程固有的局限性。在多视角捕捉中，这些问题更加突出，因为光照、传感器响应和图像信号处理器（ISP）配置的差异会引入光度和色度不一致性，这违反了现代3D新视角合成（NVS）方法（包括神经辐射场（NeRF）和3D高斯溅射（3DGS））所依赖的光度一致性假设，导致重建和渲染质量下降。我们提出了Luminance-GS++，这是一个基于3DGS的框架，用于在各种光照条件下实现鲁棒的NVS。我们的方法结合了全局视角自适应亮度调整和局部像素级残差精细化，以实现精确的颜色校正。我们进一步设计了无监督目标，共同强制执行亮度校正以及多视角几何和光度一致性。广泛的实验表明，在包括弱光、过度曝光以及复杂亮度和色度变化等具有挑战性的场景中，我们的方法表现出最先进的性能。与修改底层表示的现有方法不同，我们的方法保留了显式的3DGS公式，在提高重建保真度的同时保持了实时渲染效率。

title: On the Evaluation Protocol of Gesture Recognition for UAV-based Rescue Operation based on Deep Learning: A Subject-Independence Perspective
summary: This paper presents a methodological analysis of the gesture-recognition approach proposed by Liu and Szirányi, with a particular focus on the validity of their evaluation protocol. We show that the reported near-perfect accuracy metrics result from a frame-level random train-test split that inevitably mixes samples from the same subjects across both sets, causing severe data leakage. By examining the published confusion matrix, learning curves, and dataset construction, we demonstrate that the evaluation does not measure generalization to unseen individuals. Our findings underscore the importance of subject-independent data partitioning in vision-based gesture-recognition research, especially for applications - such as UAV-human interaction - that require reliable recognition of gestures performed by previously unseen people.
tldr: The paper critiques a gesture recognition evaluation protocol for UAV-human interaction, highlighting data leakage issues due to subject-dependent data splits, and emphasizes the importance of subject-independent evaluation.
tldr_zh: 该论文批评了一种无人机-人交互手势识别的评估协议，强调了由于主体相关的数据划分导致的数据泄漏问题，并强调了主体独立评估的重要性。
summary_zh: 本文对Liu和Szirányi提出的手势识别方法进行了方法论分析，特别关注其评估协议的有效性。我们表明，其报告的近乎完美的准确率指标源于帧级别的随机训练-测试集划分，这不可避免地将来自同一主体的样本混合到两个集合中，导致严重的数据泄露。通过检查已发表的混淆矩阵、学习曲线和数据集构建，我们证明该评估无法衡量对未见个体的泛化能力。我们的发现强调了在基于视觉的手势识别研究中，主体独立的数据划分的重要性，尤其是在诸如无人机-人交互等需要可靠识别先前未见人群所执行手势的应用中。

title: Multi-Modal Monocular Endoscopic Depth and Pose Estimation with Edge-Guided Self-Supervision
summary: Monocular depth and pose estimation play an important role in the development of colonoscopy-assisted navigation, as they enable improved screening by reducing blind spots, minimizing the risk of missed or recurrent lesions, and lowering the likelihood of incomplete examinations. However, this task remains challenging due to the presence of texture-less surfaces, complex illumination patterns, deformation, and a lack of in-vivo datasets with reliable ground truth. In this paper, we propose **PRISM** (Pose-Refinement with Intrinsic Shading and edge Maps), a self-supervised learning framework that leverages anatomical and illumination priors to guide geometric learning. Our approach uniquely incorporates edge detection and luminance decoupling for structural guidance. Specifically, edge maps are derived using a learning-based edge detector (e.g., DexiNed or HED) trained to capture thin and high-frequency boundaries, while luminance decoupling is obtained through an intrinsic decomposition module that separates shading and reflectance, enabling the model to exploit shading cues for depth estimation. Experimental results on multiple real and synthetic datasets demonstrate state-of-the-art performance. We further conduct a thorough ablation study on training data selection to establish best practices for pose and depth estimation in colonoscopy. This analysis yields two practical insights: (1) self-supervised training on real-world data outperforms supervised training on realistic phantom data, underscoring the superiority of domain realism over ground truth availability; and (2) video frame rate is an extremely important factor for model performance, where dataset-specific video frame sampling is necessary for generating high quality training data.
tldr: The paper introduces PRISM, a self-supervised learning framework for monocular endoscopic depth and pose estimation using edge detection and luminance decoupling, achieving state-of-the-art performance in colonoscopy-related tasks.
tldr_zh: 该论文提出了 PRISM，一个自监督学习框架，用于单目内窥镜深度和姿态估计，它利用边缘检测和亮度解耦，在结肠镜检查相关任务中实现了最先进的性能。
summary_zh: 单目深度和姿态估计在结肠镜辅助导航的发展中起着重要作用，因为它能够通过减少盲点、降低遗漏或复发性病变的风险以及减少不完全检查的可能性来改善筛查效果。然而，由于存在无纹理表面、复杂的光照模式、形变以及缺乏具有可靠真值的体内数据集，这项任务仍然具有挑战性。在本文中，我们提出了**PRISM**（利用内在着色和边缘图的姿态优化），一种利用解剖和光照先验来指导几何学习的自监督学习框架。我们的方法独特地结合了边缘检测和亮度解耦以进行结构引导。具体来说，边缘图是通过经过训练以捕捉细线和高频边界的基于学习的边缘检测器（例如，DexiNed或HED）推导而来，而亮度解耦是通过将着色和反射率分离的内在分解模块获得的，从而使模型能够利用着色线索进行深度估计。在多个真实和合成数据集上的实验结果表明，该方法达到了最先进的性能。我们进一步对训练数据选择进行了全面的消融研究，以建立结肠镜检查中姿态和深度估计的最佳实践。该分析得出了两个实际的见解：(1) 在真实世界数据上的自监督训练优于在逼真体模数据上的监督训练，突出了领域真实感优于真值可用性；(2) 视频帧率是模型性能的一个极其重要的因素，其中特定于数据集的视频帧采样对于生成高质量训练数据是必要的。

title: Learning Flow Distributions via Projection-Constrained Diffusion on Manifolds
summary: We present a generative modeling framework for synthesizing physically feasible two-dimensional incompressible flows under arbitrary obstacle geometries and boundary conditions. Whereas existing diffusion-based flow generators either ignore physical constraints, impose soft penalties that do not guarantee feasibility, or specialize to fixed geometries, our approach integrates three complementary components: (1) a boundary-conditioned diffusion model operating on velocity fields; (2) a physics-informed training objective incorporating a divergence penalty; and (3) a projection-constrained reverse diffusion process that enforces exact incompressibility through a geometry-aware Helmholtz-Hodge operator. We derive the method as a discrete approximation to constrained Langevin sampling on the manifold of divergence-free vector fields, providing a connection between modern diffusion models and geometric constraint enforcement in incompressible flow spaces. Experiments on analytic Navier-Stokes data and obstacle-bounded flow configurations demonstrate significantly improved divergence, spectral accuracy, vorticity statistics, and boundary consistency relative to unconstrained, projection-only, and penalty-only baselines. Our formulation unifies soft and hard physical structure within diffusion models and provides a foundation for generative modeling of incompressible fields in robotics, graphics, and scientific computing.
tldr: This paper presents a novel diffusion-based generative model for synthesizing physically feasible 2D incompressible flows with complex geometries, achieving state-of-the-art accuracy in satisfying physical constraints.
tldr_zh: 本文提出了一种新颖的基于扩散的生成模型，用于合成具有复杂几何形状的物理可行的二维不可压缩流，并在满足物理约束方面实现了最先进的精度。
summary_zh: 我们提出了一种生成式建模框架，用于合成在任意障碍几何形状和边界条件下，物理上可行的二维不可压缩流。现有基于扩散的流动生成器要么忽略物理约束，要么施加不能保证可行性的软惩罚，要么专门针对固定几何形状，而我们的方法集成了三个互补的组件：（1）在速度场上运行的边界条件扩散模型；（2）包含散度惩罚的物理信息训练目标；（3）通过几何感知的Helmholtz-Hodge算子强制实现精确不可压缩性的投影约束逆扩散过程。我们将该方法推导为在无散度向量场流形上约束朗之万采样的离散近似，从而建立了现代扩散模型与不可压缩流空间中几何约束强制之间的联系。在解析Navier-Stokes数据和障碍物约束流动配置上的实验表明，相对于非约束、仅投影和仅惩罚基线，我们的方法在散度、谱精度、涡量统计和边界一致性方面均有显著提高。我们的公式统一了扩散模型中的软硬物理结构，并为机器人、图形和科学计算中不可压缩场的生成式建模提供了基础。

title: A.R.I.S.: Automated Recycling Identification System for E-Waste Classification Using Deep Learning
summary: Traditional electronic recycling processes suffer from significant resource loss due to inadequate material separation and identification capabilities, limiting material recovery. We present A.R.I.S. (Automated Recycling Identification System), a low-cost, portable sorter for shredded e-waste that addresses this efficiency gap. The system employs a YOLOx model to classify metals, plastics, and circuit boards in real time, achieving low inference latency with high detection accuracy. Experimental evaluation yielded 90% overall precision, 82.2% mean average precision (mAP), and 84% sortation purity. By integrating deep learning with established sorting methods, A.R.I.S. enhances material recovery efficiency and lowers barriers to advanced recycling adoption. This work complements broader initiatives in extending product life cycles, supporting trade-in and recycling programs, and reducing environmental impact across the supply chain.
tldr: This paper introduces A.R.I.S., a deep learning-based system using YOLOx for real-time e-waste classification, achieving high precision and sorting purity to enhance material recovery and recycling adoption.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一个名为A.R.I.S.的系统，该系统基于深度学习并使用YOLOx进行实时电子垃圾分类，实现了高精度和分选纯度，以提高材料回收率和促进回收应用。
summary_zh: 传统电子产品回收流程因材料分离和识别能力不足而导致严重的资源损失，限制了材料的回收。我们提出了一种低成本、便携式的电子垃圾分拣机A.R.I.S.（自动化回收识别系统），以解决这一效率缺口。该系统采用YOLOx模型实时分类金属、塑料和电路板，实现了低推理延迟和高检测精度。实验评估结果表明，总体精确率为90%，平均精度均值(mAP)为82.2%，分拣纯度为84%。通过将深度学习与成熟的分拣方法相结合，A.R.I.S.提高了材料回收效率，并降低了采用先进回收技术的门槛。这项工作补充了更广泛的延长产品生命周期、支持以旧换新和回收计划以及减少整个供应链环境影响的举措。

title: Design and Characterization of a Dual-DOF Soft Shoulder Exosuit with Volume-Optimized Pneumatic Actuator
summary:
Portable pneumatic systems for 2 degree-of-freedom (DOF) soft shoulder exosuits remain underexplored, and face fundamental trade-offs between torque output and dynamic response that are further compounded by the need for multiple actuators to support complex shoulder movement. This work addresses these constraints through a volume-optimized spindle-shaped angled actuator (SSAA) geometry: by reducing actuator volume by 35.7% (357mL vs. 555mL), the SSAA maintains 94.2% of output torque while achieving 35.2% faster dynamic response compared to uniform cylindrical designs. Building on the SSAA, we develop a curved abduction actuator (CAA) based on the SSAA geometry and a horizontal adduction actuator (HAA) based on the pouch motor principle, integrating both into a dual-DOF textile-based shoulder exosuit (390 g). The exosuit delivers multi-modal assistance spanning shoulder abduction, flexion, and horizontal adduction, depending on the actuation.
  User studies with 10 healthy participants reveal that the exosuit substantially reduces electromyographic (EMG) activity across both shoulder abduction and flexion tasks. For abduction with HAA only, the exosuit achieved up to 59% muscle activity reduction across seven muscles. For flexion, both the single-actuator configuration (HAA only) and the dual-actuator configuration (HAA,+,CAA) reduced EMG activity by up to 63.7% compared to no assistance. However, the incremental benefit of adding the CAA to existing HAA support was limited in healthy users during flexion, with statistically significant additional reductions observed only in pectoralis major. These experimental findings characterize actuator contributions in healthy users and provide design guidance for multi-DOF exosuit systems.
tldr: This paper presents a dual-DOF soft shoulder exosuit with volume-optimized pneumatic actuators, demonstrating significant muscle activity reduction in healthy users during shoulder abduction and flexion tasks.
tldr_zh: 本文介绍了一种具有体积优化气动执行器的双自由度软肩外骨骼，并在健康用户的肩部外展和屈曲任务中展示了显著的肌肉活动减少。
summary_zh:
用于双自由度 (DOF) 软肩外骨骼的便携式气动系统仍未得到充分探索，并且面临扭矩输出和动态响应之间的根本权衡，而支持复杂肩部运动所需的多重执行器进一步加剧了这种权衡。本文通过一种体积优化的梭形倾斜执行器 (SSAA) 几何结构来解决这些限制：通过将执行器体积减少 35.7%（357mL 对比 555mL），SSAA 可保持 94.2% 的输出扭矩，同时实现比均匀圆柱形设计快 35.2% 的动态响应。在 SSAA 的基础上，我们开发了一种基于 SSAA 几何结构的弯曲外展执行器 (CAA) 和一种基于囊式电机原理的水平内收执行器 (HAA)，并将两者集成到双自由度纺织品肩部外骨骼 (390 g) 中。根据驱动方式，该外骨骼可提供涵盖肩部外展、屈曲和水平内收的多模式辅助。

对 10 名健康参与者的用户研究表明，该外骨骼显著降低了肩部外展和屈曲任务中的肌电 (EMG) 活动。对于仅使用 HAA 进行的外展，该外骨骼在七块肌肉上实现了高达 59% 的肌肉活动减少。对于屈曲，单执行器配置（仅 HAA）和双执行器配置（HAA,+,CAA）都比无辅助时降低了高达 63.7% 的 EMG 活动。然而，在屈曲期间，对于健康用户而言，向现有 HAA 支持添加 CAA 的增量效益有限，仅在胸大肌中观察到具有统计学意义的额外活动减少。这些实验结果描述了健康用户中执行器的贡献，并为多自由度外骨骼系统提供了设计指导。

title: Evolution of Safety Requirements in Industrial Robotics: Comparative Analysis of ISO 10218-1/2 (2011 vs. 2025) and Integration of ISO/TS 15066
summary: Industrial robotics has established itself as an integral component of large-scale manufacturing enterprises. Simultaneously, collaborative robotics is gaining prominence, introducing novel paradigms of human-machine interaction. These advancements have necessitated a comprehensive revision of safety standards, specifically incorporating requirements for cybersecurity and protection against unauthorized access in networked robotic systems. This article presents a comparative analysis of the ISO 10218:2011 and ISO 10218:2025 standards, examining the evolution of their structure, terminology, technical requirements, and annexes. The analysis reveals significant expansions in functional safety and cybersecurity, the introduction of new classifications for robots and collaborative applications, and the normative integration of the technical specification ISO/TS 15066. Consequently, the new edition synthesizes mechanical, functional, and digital safety requirements, establishing a comprehensive framework for the design and operation of modern robotic systems.
tldr: The paper presents a comparative analysis of industrial robotics safety standards (ISO 10218:2011 vs. ISO 10218:2025) highlighting advancements in functional safety, cybersecurity, new robot classifications, and integration of ISO/TS 15066, creating a comprehensive safety framework for modern robotics.
tldr_zh: 该论文对工业机器人安全标准（ISO 10218:2011 vs. ISO 10218:2025）进行了比较分析，重点介绍了功能安全、网络安全、新的机器人分类以及ISO/TS 15066的集成方面的进展，从而为现代机器人技术创建了一个全面的安全框架。
summary_zh: 工业机器人已确立其作为大规模制造企业不可或缺的组成部分。与此同时，协作机器人正日益普及，引入人机交互的新范式。这些进步促使对安全标准进行全面修订，特别是纳入网络机器人系统中针对网络安全和防止未经授权访问的要求。本文对 ISO 10218:2011 和 ISO 10218:2025 标准进行了比较分析，考察了其结构、术语、技术要求和附录的演变。分析表明，功能安全和网络安全方面有了显著扩展，引入了机器人和协作应用的新分类，以及技术规范 ISO/TS 15066 的规范性整合。 因此，新版本综合了机械、功能和数字安全要求，为现代机器人系统的设计和运行建立了一个全面的框架。

title: Mind the Style: Impact of Communication Style on Human-Chatbot Interaction
summary: Conversational agents increasingly mediate everyday digital interactions, yet the effects of their communication style on user experience and task success remain unclear. Addressing this gap, we describe the results of a between-subject user study where participants interact with one of two versions of a chatbot called NAVI which assists users in an interactive map-based 2D navigation task. The two chatbot versions differ only in communication style: one is friendly and supportive, while the other is direct and task-focused. Our results show that the friendly style increases subjective satisfaction and significantly improves task completion rates among female participants only, while no baseline differences between female and male participants were observed in a control condition without the chatbot. Furthermore, we find little evidence of users mimicking the chatbot's style, suggesting limited linguistic accommodation. These findings highlight the importance of user- and task-sensitive conversational agents and support that communication style personalization can meaningfully enhance interaction quality and performance.
tldr: This paper investigates the impact of friendly vs. direct communication styles in chatbots on user satisfaction and task completion in a navigation task, finding that a friendly style improves completion rates for female users.
tldr_zh: 本文研究了友善型和直接型聊天机器人在导航任务中对用户满意度和任务完成度的影响，发现友善型聊天机器人可以提高女性用户的任务完成率。
summary_zh: 会话式智能体越来越多地参与日常数字互动，但它们的沟通风格对用户体验和任务成功的影响尚不明确。为了填补这一空白，我们描述了一项受试者间用户研究的结果，在该研究中，参与者与一个名为 NAVI 的聊天机器人的两个版本之一进行交互，该机器人协助用户完成基于交互式地图的 2D 导航任务。这两个聊天机器人版本仅在沟通风格上有所不同：一个是友好且支持性的，而另一个是直接且以任务为中心的。我们的结果表明，友好的风格提高了主观满意度，并且仅在女性参与者中显著提高了任务完成率，而在没有聊天机器人的对照条件下，没有观察到女性和男性参与者之间的基线差异。此外，我们发现用户模仿聊天机器人风格的证据很少，表明语言顺应性有限。这些发现强调了用户和任务敏感型会话式智能体的重要性，并支持沟通风格个性化可以有意义地提高互动质量和性能。

title: CityGuard: Graph-Aware Private Descriptors for Bias-Resilient Identity Search Across Urban Cameras
summary: City-scale person re-identification across distributed cameras must handle severe appearance changes from viewpoint, occlusion, and domain shift while complying with data protection rules that prevent sharing raw imagery. We introduce CityGuard, a topology-aware transformer for privacy-preserving identity retrieval in decentralized surveillance. The framework integrates three components. A dispersion-adaptive metric learner adjusts instance-level margins according to feature spread, increasing intra-class compactness. Spatially conditioned attention injects coarse geometry, such as GPS or deployment floor plans, into graph-based self-attention to enable projectively consistent cross-view alignment using only coarse geometric priors without requiring survey-grade calibration. Differentially private embedding maps are coupled with compact approximate indexes to support secure and cost-efficient deployment. Together these designs produce descriptors robust to viewpoint variation, occlusion, and domain shifts, and they enable a tunable balance between privacy and utility under rigorous differential-privacy accounting. Experiments on Market-1501 and additional public benchmarks, complemented by database-scale retrieval studies, show consistent gains in retrieval precision and query throughput over strong baselines, confirming the practicality of the framework for privacy-critical urban identity matching.
tldr: The paper introduces CityGuard, a privacy-preserving person re-identification framework that leverages graph-aware transformers and differential privacy to achieve robust and efficient identity matching across urban cameras, even with viewpoint variations and occlusions.
tldr_zh: 该论文介绍了 CityGuard，一个保护隐私的行人重识别框架，该框架利用图感知Transformer和差分隐私，实现了在城市摄像头网络中鲁棒且高效的身份匹配，即使存在视角变化和遮挡。
summary_zh: 城市尺度下跨分布式摄像头的行人重识别必须应对来自视角、遮挡和领域迁移造成的严重外观变化，同时遵守防止共享原始图像的数据保护规则。我们提出 CityGuard，一种拓扑感知的 Transformer，用于去中心化监控中的隐私保护身份检索。该框架集成了三个组件。一种离散度自适应度量学习器，根据特征分布调整实例级边距，从而提高类内紧凑性。空间条件注意力将粗略的几何信息（例如，GPS 或部署平面图）注入到基于图的自注意力中，以仅使用粗略几何先验实现射影一致的跨视角对齐，而无需测量级的校准。差分隐私嵌入图与紧凑的近似索引相结合，以支持安全且经济高效的部署。这些设计共同产生对视角变化、遮挡和领域迁移鲁棒的描述符，并在严格的差分隐私核算下实现隐私和效用之间的可调平衡。在 Market-1501 和其他公共基准上的实验，以及补充的数据库级检索研究，表明相对于强大的基线，检索精度和查询吞吐量均持续提升，证实了该框架在对隐私敏感的城市身份匹配中的实用性。
